description: Phase 3 machine index: adds display_name, when_to_avoid, pairs_poorly_with extracted from pilot markdown (schema 0.3). Prose remains canonical in *_pilot_v1.md.

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute injury pain; illness; extreme heat without acclimation and adjusted expectations; first quality day back after layoff (shorter continuous block or fewer intervals first).
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Heavy VO2 session next day; long marathon-pace segment the same day; race week except experienced athletes under explicit guidance.

variants.when_to_avoid: Athletes who cannot self-regulate early pace; injury_return where any late hard segment is contraindicated.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: All-out long run the next morning; adjacent threshold days for low-tolerance athletes.

variants.when_to_avoid: Same as continuous threshold when systemic fatigue is extreme; redundant if another dense threshold session exists the same week without SME intent.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Another threshold-dense day immediately after for fragile athletes.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return unless blocks are short and SME-approved; minimal_sharpen (usually one short touch instead).
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Another double-threshold pattern in the same week without volume to support it.

variants.when_to_avoid: Athlete turns jog into stride; acute calf/Achilles irritation from turnover changes.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Heavy eccentric day (long steep downs) prior; VO2 micro-intervals same day.

variants.when_to_avoid: First quality session off layoff—prefer fewer reps or short continuous block.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Long marathon-pace segment later the same day.

variants.when_to_avoid: Low durability unless volume is cut sharply.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Heavy long-run fatigue + next-day repeat for injury-prone masters.

variants.when_to_avoid: Novices; injury_return; heat without fueling/hydration plan.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Already-high average intensity week; strides + hills stacked as second hard CNS day.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return, durability_rebuild (surge-like loading); anyone who cannot separate threshold from VO2.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Other high-transition hard sessions same microcycle for fragile athletes.

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute injury or medical guidance where long duration or impact is contraindicated; injury_return: length and tolerance are highly individual—shorten or defer until load is re-established.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Heavy VO2 or long MP block same day; racing long hard mid-week without recovery context.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return until easy longs (and easy bulk discipline) are consistently tolerated; acute flare patterns with late-hard running.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Standalone threshold-dense day next morning for low-tolerance athletes without explicit plan intent.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return; low durability; extreme heat without adjusted expectations; novice/first-marathon athletes still building base.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: long_mp_continuous_marathon, long_mp_intervals_in_long, or long_hmp_finish_half_marathon in the same microcycle without explicit volume/tolerance rationale.

variants.when_to_avoid: First marathon build or few lifetime long runs; injury_return; athletes who cannot hold two distinct gears; minimal_sharpen full dose; no recent steady MP foundation; novice or low-mileage profiles.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: vo2_3x2mi_long_reps same week without SME; long_mp_continuous_marathon dress-rehearsal week overload without rationale.

variants.when_to_avoid: When maximum simplicity is needed (fold into plain easy days); acute injury patterns where any extra duration mid-week hurts.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Threshold intervals or VO2 same day; long_mp or heavy quality next day without recovery rationale.

variants.display_name: Long run with continuous marathon-pace block
variants.when_to_avoid: Half-marathon-primary athletes unless explicitly repurposed; injury_return; early base before easy longs and easy discipline are solid; low durability / low data confidence on appropriate MP.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Dense long_hmp_finish_half_marathon week; long_mp_intervals_in_long plus this variant without volume rationale; threshold-heavy adjacent days for fragile athletes without intent.

variants.display_name: Long run with MP intervals (easy between)
variants.when_to_avoid: Same family contraindications as long_mp_continuous_marathon; novices without easy-long foundation; injury_return unless explicitly progressed.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: long_mp_continuous_marathon plus this pattern in the same week without volume support; stacked MP elsewhere without rationale.

variants.display_name: Long run with half-marathon pace finish
variants.when_to_avoid: Marathon-primary athletes unless explicitly repurposed; injury_return; early base; athletes without easy bulk discipline.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Dense long_mp_continuous_marathon / long_mp_intervals_in_long in the same week for single-distance focus athletes without explicit rationale.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return; athletes who cannot hold easy early; low self-regulation / always-overpace profiles until basics improve; low weekly mileage or few long-run exposures.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Dense alternating_threshold_on_minutes or other threshold-heavy weeks for fragile athletes without rationale.

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute injury where running is contraindicated; replace with rest or cross-train per medical guidance.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: None inherently—errors are pace, not pairing.

variants.when_to_avoid: When complete rest is clearly better (illness, acute pain, severe fatigue)—prefer rest_day_complete or off-feet guidance.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Back-to-back recovery runs used to avoid scheduling a real easy or rest—usually a planning smell unless athlete-specific.

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute hamstring/calf flare; injury_return where any fast mechanics are barred.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Redundant stride gear when the week already saturated that system (complementarity in Deterministic selection logic).

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute lower-leg / foot pain; injury_return until easy running is consistently tolerated; no suitable hill—then substitute (e.g. easy_strides with appropriate gear).
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Uncontrolled stacking of multiple high-density power touches without recovery narrative—detect via ledger.

variants.when_to_avoid: Same as easy_strides_neuromuscular_touch.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Same ledger redundancy rules as easy_strides_neuromuscular_touch.

variants.when_to_avoid: N/A as a safety concept—avoidance is about plan balance, not contraindication.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Zero rest weeks for populations that require rest—selection error.

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute hamstring/calf flare; no warm-up discipline; same week as maximal neuromuscular load without taper intent.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Second VO2-density day for low-tolerance athletes; race week full dose except experienced profiles.

variants.when_to_avoid: Athlete cannot hold even splits; returning from layoff—prefer 400 variant or threshold first.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Dense threshold_intervals same week without recovery narrative.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return default—prefer shorter reps or omit; minimal_sharpen unless SME micro-dose.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Same-day long MP blocks; back-to-back hard quality without easy between.

variants.when_to_avoid: Marathon-primary plans without SME cross-goal reason; early build before short rep foundation. Single-quality weeks where interval day should prioritize ceiling (5K-anchor reps).
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Redundant long tempo-like work same week—ledger check (threshold saturation).

variants.when_to_avoid: Wrong goal distance; too early in 5K progression (prefer 400/800 variants first).
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Duplicate 1K-heavy weeks without progression intent.

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute pain; illness; when complete omission of VO2 is smarter.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Full vo2_peak_fitness_sustained_reps same week.

variants.when_to_avoid: Peak week overload mistake—this variant is not "main load."
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Heavy threshold + heavy long quality same week.

variants.when_to_avoid: Planner forgets ledger and ships 1K stack—regression mode.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Unmodified vo2_1000m_reps_classic when ledger threshold-saturated.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return, durability_rebuild, minimal_sharpen (except SME), low sleep / illness flags.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Stacked unknown-density weeks; duplicate VO2 without intent.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return, minimal_sharpen (full ladder), early relationship with VO2 unless shortened ladder; weeks already dense in reps or threshold_intervals.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Second complex VO2 or dense threshold without recovery narrative.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return; athletes without even-split discipline; same week as 1200m race-rhythm overload for 10K without rationale.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: vo2_peak_fitness_sustained_reps stacked blindly same week.

variants.when_to_avoid: injury_return, minimal_sharpen, low-mileage athletes without long rep history.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: long_mp_over_under_alternating_miles same week without explicit SME (both are heavy MP-adjacent stress families).

variants.when_to_avoid: Acute hamstring/calf pain; illness; injury_return unless SME shortens sharply.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Second heavy speed day for fragile athletes; long MP block same day.

variants.when_to_avoid: Same as 200m variant; minimal_sharpen usually shortens or defers to strides.
variants.pairs_poorly_with: Duplicate long-rep speed stress without intent.
